title: Jesus' Totem
description: This mod adds godly screen & sound effects to the Totem of Undying. Experience the power of God!
body:
# Jesus' Totem

Jesus' Totem is a simple mod which adds godly screen & sound effects to the Totem of Undying:

<video autoplay loop>
    <source src="https://github.com/Camper-CoolDie/JesusTotem/raw/refs/heads/1.21.3/showcase.mp4" alt="Showcase of using the Totem of Undying">
</video>

## Installation notes

- **Fabric**: Minecraft versions 1.20.2-1.21.2 require [Fabric API](https:/modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), otherwise mod assets may fail to load
- **NeoForge**: The mod doesn't support beta versions of NeoForge (so it doesn't support 1.21.2, 1.21.6 and 1.21.7)

## Features

- New totem usage sound that combines [a bell](https://youtu.be/h-KNrxDgeLI) and
  [a prayer](https://youtu.be/3DqFjF0D264)
- Fullscreen effect consisting of 3 pictures with Jesus descending from heaven. Each picture is
  shown on every bell's beat (can be customized in the configuration).
- New icon of the Totem of Undying

## Configuration

The mod lets you change fade-in, hold and fade-out durations of God showing on the screen. Because
time between beats is limited the sum of durations cannot be greater than 100% (1680 ms). The
config is available at `config/jesustotem.json`. You can also access the configuration screen in
your mod menu.

Parameters:

- `jesus_fade_in`: Fade-in duration in milliseconds. Default: `0`
- `jesus_hold`: Hold duration in milliseconds. Default: `0`
- `jesus_fade_out`: Fade-out duration in milliseconds. Default: `840`

## Credits

Thanks to [Sl1epy](https://namemc.com/profile/Sl1epy) for the idea and
[Xantep01d](https://twitch.tv/xantep01d) for testing & showcasing!

## Notice

All images containing Jesus Christ are generated by AI and thus they aren't copyrighted. For the
same reason you may observe small logical errors on these images.
